core_concepts: FDA 2023 final rule amendments to radiological health regulations
Changes to records and reporting requirements for radiation-emitting products
Conformance with IEC 60825-1 Ed. 3 and IEC 60601-2-22 Ed. 3.1
Laser Notice No. 56 guidance for industry

key_terms.definition: FDA rule amending records and reports for radiation emitting electronic products, effective February 21, 2023
Regulation covering records and reports for electronic products
Low Power Laser Reporting Exemption guidance
Clarification of compliance requirements for manufacturers incorporating certified Class I laser products
Guidance on conformance with IEC 60825-1 Ed. 3 and IEC 60601-2-22 Ed. 3.1
Office of Health Technology 8: Office of Radiological Health

learning_objectives: Understand recent FDA regulatory changes to laser product reporting
Identify exemptions from annual reporting requirements
Know where to find additional FDA guidance documents
Recognize the role of Laser Notices in regulatory compliance
prerequisites: Basic understanding of FDA regulatory framework
